case_title: EUGENIO ALBERTO SOTO MALDONADO VS. PATRICK JUN W. LIN,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOTO MALDONADO, EUGENIO ALBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT LIN,, PATRICK JUN W. AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
